context: Tests whether the agent keeps SpriteKit focused on 2D gameplay while routing neighboring Apple game and social features to sibling frameworks.

checklist.name: SpriteKit ownership
checklist.description: Keeps SpriteKit ownership to 2D scene rendering, node hierarchy, sprites, actions, physics, contacts, particles, tile maps, camera, input, SKAudioNode, and SpriteView integration.

checklist.name: GameKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes Game Center authentication, access point, leaderboards, achievements, matchmaking, saved games, and player identity verification to GameKit guidance.

checklist.name: 3D framework handoff
checklist.description: Routes 3D cutscenes or 3D board scenes to SceneKit or RealityKit guidance instead of expanding SpriteKit scope beyond narrow SK3DNode or 2D overlay boundaries.

checklist.name: TabletopKit handoff
checklist.description: Routes board-game rules, pieces, cards, dice, spatial table sessions, and visionOS tabletop logic to TabletopKit guidance.

checklist.name: SharePlay handoff
checklist.description: Routes SharePlay voice or synchronized group sessions to GroupActivities or SharePlay guidance rather than presenting them as SpriteKit APIs.
